---
title: "Kissy Face Emoji"
subtitle: "R1 #2"
description: "Pucker up and blow a kiss to the sky!"
author: "Rudy"
date: "2026-03-24"
# date-modified: "2026-03-24"
draft: false
categories:
  - fruita
  - poems
  - rattlesnake arches
  - R1
---

Along the trail's winding way,  
A pucker stops, brightens your day,  
With lips pursed tight in stone surprise,  
A smooch that hangs before your eyes.  

No artist hand or potter’s clay,  
A kissy-face built the R1 way.  
From grains of rock and wind-filled days,  
Left out here for us to praise.  

Accidental emoji from ancient art,  
Still stole my playful desert heart.  
So blow a kiss, back to the sky,  
And let your happy spirits fly.  

::: {.panel-tabset}

## Hints
*Click to expand the sections below.*  

::: {.callout-tip collapse="true"}
## Hint #1: Help...what am I looking for?

Look closely and you'll find something that resembles a kissy-face emoji near the R1 trail.
:::

::: {.callout-tip collapse="true"}
## Hint #2: In what general area should I look?

[![This feature can be found somewhere along the section of trail highlighted in purple above. Click for an interactive map.](images/r1_kiss_map_hint.png)](https://www.openstreetmap.org/directions?engine=fossgis_osrm_foot&route=39.132308%2C-108.764294%3B39.135494%2C-108.768554#map=17/39.134280/-108.766773&layers=P)


:::

::: {.callout-tip collapse="true"}
## Hint #3: Ok, I need a photo hint please.

![Here's a blurred version of the location you're looking for. Can you find this area?](images/r1_kiss_hint.jpg){.img-blur1}

:::

## Answer

::: {.callout-tip appearance="minimal" collapse="false"}
[![](images/r1_kiss_answer_annotated.jpg)](images/r1_kiss_answer_annotated.jpg)

GPS coordinates of this photo: 39.14691, -108.84625

[![Click for interactive map](images/r1_kiss_map.png)](https://www.openstreetmap.org/?mlat=39.14691&mlon=-108.84625&zoom=19)

:::
